    Checks if the given MiiProcedure contains any OPS code that is subsumed by one of the provided OPS codes via prefix matching (e.g., 5-480 matches 5-480.2).

    • isIcdCodeInCondition

      public static boolean isIcdCodeInCondition(MiiCondition condition, Collection<String> icdCodes)

    • isIcdCodeInConditionWithPrefixWildcardCheck

      public static boolean isIcdCodeInConditionWithPrefixWildcardCheck(MiiCondition condition, Collection<String> icdCodes)
      Checks if the given MiiCondition contains any ICD code that is subsumed by one of the provided ICD codes via prefix matching (e.g., I48 matches I48.2).

      This enables broader matching based on ICD code categories.

      Example: If icdCodes contains "I48", it matches condition codes such as "I48.0", "I48.1", "I48.2" etc.

      Parameters:
      condition - the condition to check
      icdCodes - the collection of ICD code prefixes to match against
      Returns:
      true if any coding in the condition starts with any of the provided ICD codes, false otherwise or if the condition is null

    • isOpsCodeInProcedureWithPrefixWildcardCheck

      public static boolean isOpsCodeInProcedureWithPrefixWildcardCheck(MiiProcedure procedure, Collection<String> icdCodes)
      Checks if the given MiiProcedure contains any OPS code that is subsumed by one of the provided OPS codes via prefix matching (e.g., 5-480 matches 5-480.2).

      This enables broader matching based on OPS code categories.

      Example: If icdCodes contains "5-480", it matches procedure codes such as "5-480.0", "5-480.1", "5-480.2" etc.

      Parameters:
      procedure - the procedure to check
      icdCodes - the collection of OPS code prefixes to match against
      Returns:
      true if any coding in the procedure starts with any of the provided OPS codes, false otherwise or if the procedure is null

    • getEncounterIdsByIcdCodes

      public static Set<String> getEncounterIdsByIcdCodes(Collection<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, Collection<String> icdCodes)
      Finds case IDs from a collection of UkbConditions that contain at least one ICD code from the provided set.
      Parameters:
      ukbConditions - A collection of MiiCondition objects.
      icdCodes - A collection of ICD (International Classification of Diseases) codes as strings.
      Returns:
      A Set of unique case IDs found within the UkbConditions that have matching ICD codes.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either ukbConditions or icdCodes is null.

    • getPatientIdsByIcdCodes

      public static Set<String> getPatientIdsByIcdCodes(Collection<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, Collection<String> icdCodes)

    • getCaseIdsWithIcdCodeReliability

      public static Set<String> getCaseIdsWithIcdCodeReliability(Collection<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, Collection<String> icdCodes, String reliability)

    • filterConditionsByRecordDate

      public static List<MiiCondition> filterConditionsByRecordDate(List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, Date referenceDate)
      Filters a list of UKB conditions to include only those that have a recorded date after the specified reference date.
      Parameters:
      ukbConditions - A list of MiiCondition objects to be filtered.
      referenceDate - The date to compare against; only conditions recorded after this date will be included.
      Returns:
      A list of MiiCondition objects that have a recorded date after the specified reference date. If no conditions meet the criteria, an empty list is returned.
